themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "Bashan was a fertile plateau region northeast of the Sea of Galilee, known for strong cattle...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "What 'giants' in your life require remembering God's past faithfulness to conquer present fear?". Word-study detail reinforces "תִּירָ֣א: unto me Fear - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
